description: Deed of acknowledgment (iqrār). In Arabic script. Ottoman-era. Needs examination for content. There is a note in the margin at 90 degrees in Judaeo-Arabic, which mentions a date, and another similar note on verso. There is a large red stamp (with some Arabic words) at the top of recto, and a small black stamp on verso.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
